# Concert Ticket Benchmark - Numbered Seats (Hotspot)
# 80% requests -> 5% seats
# Format: BUY <client_id> <seat_id> <request_id>

BUY user00001 1 00001
BUY user00002 2 00002
BUY user00003 3 00003
BUY user00004 4 00004
